MINI MINUTES: Small Claims Appeal on calendar THU-APR-22-2021 in Dept. 305.
Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings Not Reported.

Appearances:
Katrina Decker, Plaintiff / Respondent in propria persona (T: 415.317.0009).
Alex Lemberg, Esq. (Open Door Legal, T: 4155.735.4124) appearing on behalf of Defendant / Appellant Kendrick Huey. Defendant is not present.

This matter was assigned by the Presiding Judge in Dept. 206 for a trial de novo.
The Court grants the parties request to continue this matter to finalize their settlement agreement.

By agreement of the parties and order of the Court, this matter is continued to FRIDAY, JULY 23, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 305. The Court further directs the parties to notify the court, prior to the continuance date, if the matter is settled.
